---
title: "FisheyeCoefficients"
---
<!-- DO NOT EDIT! This file was auto-generated by crates/build/re_types_builder/src/codegen/docs/website.rs -->

Fisheye radial distortion coefficients (k1, k2, k3, k4) for the equidistant (OpenCV) model.

The distorted angle is computed as:
  theta_d = theta * (1 + k1*theta^2 + k2*theta^4 + k3*theta^6 + k4*theta^8)

When all coefficients are zero, the pure equidistant model (r = f * theta) is used.

## Rerun datatype
[`Vec4D`](../datatypes/vec4d.md)


## Arrow datatype
```
FixedSizeList<4, float32>
```
